visual.name: datepickerSlicer
visual.description: A compact date picker slicer visual for selecting a single date or a date range.

en-US.datepicker.landing.bindField: Bind a date field to use this visual
en-US.datepicker.status.bindField: Bind a Date field to the visual.
en-US.datepicker.status.noHostApi: Unable to apply filter: host API not available.
en-US.datepicker.help.operator: Choose Include or Exclude for the selection.
en-US.format.slice.compactMode.description: Hide labels and tighten padding for narrow spaces.
en-US.format.slice.defaultSelectionKey.descrip: Used when clearing resets to a saved default selection.
en-US.format.slice.behavior.dateTimeSelectionM: Full day treats DateTime columns as 00:00–23:59:59.999 (recommended).
Pick which bound date column to use when multiple candidates exist.
en-US.license.banner.upgrade.summary: Unlock Pro: advanced calendars, preset packs, and layout control.
en-US.license.banner.trial.summary: Start a trial: advanced calendars, preset packs, and layout control.
en-US.license.banner.learnMore: Enter a key or start a trial in Format pane → License.
en-US.warning.title: Check selection
en-US.warning.noBinding: Bind a date field to use this visual.
en-US.warning.invalidIsoWeek: ISO week values are out of range.
en-US.warning.invalidRollingN: Rolling N is outside the allowed bounds.
en-US.warning.constraintsInvalid: Constraints are invalid (min date exceeds max date).
en-US.warning.constraintsClamped: Selection was clamped to allowed limits.
en-US.warning.bindingMissing.status: Preferred field missing; using fallback date field
